message.content:
```json
{
  "posts": [
    {
      "id": "DAY1-011",
      "author": "User_9921",
      "text": "I am so frustrated with my bank! They just took another fee out of my account. Here is the summary of my account showing the transaction: [Account Number: 8829-4410, Balance: $450.20]. Can someone help me get this back?",
      "category": "Privacy",
      "correctAction": "Escalate",
      "difficulty": "Easy",
      "explanation": "The post contains sensitive personal banking information, which requires escalation for privacy review.",
      "day": 1,
      "correctEscalationReason": "PrivacySensitiveInfo",
      "acceptableEscalationReasons": [
        "PrivacySensitiveInfo"
      ],
      "allowNeedsReviewEscalation": false
    }
  ]
}
```
